channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Want to Buy Tesla? 3 Reasons to Buy This Luxury Automaker's Stock Instead.
item.description: Tesla is driving head-on into a more uncertain future, and if investors aren't prepared to accept that risk, this luxury automaker might be just the company to check out instead.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Stock Looks Expensive Following Its 81% Five Year Gain
item.description: Tesla stock has delivered an 81.4% gain over the past 5 years, yet current valuation checks flag it as expensive rather than a clear bargain, creating a tension for anyone trying to square the long term share price performance with today’s pricing. With the market assigning a rich multiple and re...

item.title: TSLA Stock Climbs Overnight: ‘SPAC King’ Chamath Palihapitiya Sees ‘Obvious’ Logic In Tesla-SpaceX Merger
item.description: The investor said a combined company could use one balance sheet and capital structure to fund Elon Musk’s broader ambitions.

item.title: FSD v14 Lite remains limited release even when it shows good performance on HW3 cars
item.description: submitted by /u/CarCooler [link] [comments]

item.title: FSD avoids road debris
item.description: Driving to work on FSD in my Model Y when a construction barricade landed on the highway. FSD noticed the road debris and quickly evaded the hazard. This whole event happened so quickly.

item.title: Elon Musk quietly buys a $1 billion gas turbine company to power Grok
item.description: Elon Musk has quietly bought APR Energy, a Jacksonville-based company that operates a fleet of mobile gas and diesel turbines totaling more than 1 GW of generation capacity. The self-styled champion of a “solar electric economy” now owns a fossil fuel power company — and he’s buying it to feed th...

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises After Wave of Wall Street Target Hikes
item.description: Analysts Boost Tesla Targets, but the Real Catalyst Isn't Earnings

item.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Posts Best Quarter in Two Years
item.description: Tesla smashed delivery expectations, but was it just a fluke?

item.title: Zipline Accelerates U.S. Growth with 13X Marketplace Expansion, New Leadership Hires, and Launches in Austin and Cleveland
item.description: Drone delivery leader brings on former Tesla, Waymo, and Uber executives to support rapid expansion of food, retail, healthcare deliveries across U.S. Zipline Surpasses 2.5 million Deliveries and Announces Operations in Austin and Cleveland Zipline, the world's largest and most experienced drone ...

item.title: Tesla AI Chief Ashok Elluswamy Says Optimus Has 'Big Shoes to Fill' After Model S, X Production Line Closure
item.description: Tesla Inc.‘s artificial intelligence lead, Ashok Elluswamy, hailed the sunset Model S and Model X premium vehicles as the Fremont facility gears up for Optimus humanoid robot production. ‘Big Shoes to Fill’ In a post on X, Elluswamy quoted a...

item.title: Tesla Is Refunding Incorrect Supercharger Fees in Some Areas
item.description: Tesla Is Refunding Incorrect Supercharger Fees in Some Areas

item.title: Tesla Stock Gains After Four Price-Target Hikes Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
item.description: Wall Street upped its view of Tesla stock ahead of its second-quarter earnings, as investors await news on robotaxis and robots.

item.title: Exclusive: Tesla HW4 Vehicles Also Run Distilled FSD Models

item.title: Tesla Rolls Out FSD V14.3.5: First Impressions & What's New
item.description: Tesla Rolls Out FSD V14.3.5: First Impressions & What's New

item.title: TSLA Stock Remains Volatile Ahead Of Q2 Earnings: Analysts Raise Price Targets With Cautious Optimism
item.description: Several Wall Street analysts issued modest price target increases on Tuesday, in light of Tesla’s upcoming July 22 earnings release.

item.title: What If the Car Is No Longer the Point For Tesla Stock?
item.description: The company is making a fundamental pivot you might have missed, and it has nothing to do with building more vehicles.

item.title: Tesla App Now Includes Rainbow Road Easter Egg
item.description: Tesla App Now Includes Rainbow Road Easter Egg

item.title: Tesla owner attempts resale of Model S Signature Edition for over $260k
item.description: A Tesla owner who purchased a Model S Signature Edition, one of the final 250 units of the all-electric flagship vehicle that the company discontinued earlier this year, is attempting to sell the car despite a no-resale clause that prohibits reselling for the first year. The car is being sold by ...

item.title: Tesla's Strong Auto, Energy Deliveries Position it for Solid Q2, Morgan Stanley Says
item.description: Tesla's (TSLA) strong auto and energy deliveries set up the electric vehicle maker for a solid Q2, b

item.title: Elon Musk Dubs Him ‘Scam Altman’ Not Sam — Then Altman Clapped Back: ‘Homeboy You’re The One Selling Space Datacenters’
item.description: Elon Musk revived his “Scam Altman” jab after Apple’s lawsuit against OpenAI. Altman fired back, questioning SpaceX’s orbital AI plans as investors weigh the company’s ambitious growth strategy.

item.title: Tesla moves to guarantee resale value for buyers after price cuts
item.description: Tesla is launching a new “guaranteed future value” (GFV) program that locks in a pre-set resale price for buyers financing a new Model Y or Model 3. The move directly targets the depreciation fears that have followed Tesla’s own aggressive price cuts over the last two years.

item.title: Tesla and Meta Are Worth Almost the Same. Which Stock Is the Better Buy?
item.description: One stock has a very high ceiling, while the other has a much higher floor.

item.title: The Massive Reason to Buy Tesla Before July 22 Earnings
item.description: Tesla is sitting 10% below where it started the year, but the options market and a rapidly changing cost structure tell a very different story about what happens after July 22.

item.title: Better Elon Musk Buy: SpaceX’s Ascent or Tesla’s Robotics Revolution?
item.description: SpaceX is tantalizing early investors with an $800 analyst price target while Tesla quietly pivots toward a robotics revolution that could reshape daily life faster than any orbital data center. Picking the right Elon Musk bet right now might come down to one critical question about timing.

item.title: Three Price Target Boosts Can’t Help Tesla Stock
item.description: Tesla stock was wobbling at the start of Tuesday trading as investors mulled over what a couple of Wall Street price target hikes could do for it. Shares of the electric-vehicle maker were up 14 cents in premarket trading at $394.90, while and futures were down 0.1% and 0.3%, respectively. The...

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving v14.3.5 Early Impressions: new features and early performance
item.description: Tesla rolled out Full Self-Driving (Supervised) v14.3.5 yesterday, and about fifty miles of driving on the new version has given me enough time to highlight what seems to be strong about the release and what is not. Additionally, Tesla has added a few new features with this specific update, which...

item.title: Saudi Arabia Commercial Vehicle Electrification (Trucks & Buses) Market Study Published; Profiles Tesla, Volvo Group, Daimler AG, and 12 Key Players
item.description: The Saudi Arabia Commercial Vehicle Electrification Market is poised for growth via expanding charging networks and partnerships with logistics firms. Government support, rising fuel prices, and battery advancements drive demand for zero-emission vehicles, particularly in urban areas prioritizing...

item.title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Apple, Tesla and Intel
item.description: Apple, Tesla and Intel have been highlighted in this Investment Ideas article.

item.title: Tesla makes the cut on California’s newest EV Rebate program
item.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom signed SB 168 into law on Monday, July 13, 2026, creating a $270 million EV rebate program that delivers money directly at the dealership rather than as a tax credit applied months later. The program, called MyFirstEV , is funded equally by California’s state budg...

item.title: Cybercab spotting!
item.description: Looks awesome in person! Saw it while charging around 10pm in the 8 mins from Giga Factory! submitted by /u/Snoo_18581 [link] [comments]

item.title: TSLA Stock Back To $400? Jefferies Lays Out Bull Case, Says ​​SpaceX Merger Could Hand Shareholders A Premium
item.description: Jefferies said Tesla’s growth and earnings deterioration are beginning to reverse ahead of its July 22 results.

item.title: Top Tesla investor warns Saylor is destroying Bitcoin
item.description: Ross Gerber has run out of patience with Michael Saylor. The Gerber Kawasaki CEO and one of Tesla's most prominent public investors posted on Sunday in response to Saylor's latest Bitcoin content on X, a video captioned "The Right to Bear Arms", with a bluntness that left little room for ...

item.title: XPENG Aims to Go Head to Head with Tesla in Europe with Self-Driving Tech
item.description: XPENG has been developing self-driving tech in a very similar way as Tesla for several years. In fact, while pretty much everyone else has decided radar and/or lidar sensors are needed in addition to cameras, XPENG has stuck with Elon Musk’s argument that cameras are the only sensors needed. Our ...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Registers a Bigger Fall Than the Market: Important Facts to Note
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) closed the most recent trading day at $394.76, moving 3.19% from the previous trading session.

item.title: Tesla FSD Inches Closer to Regulatory Approval in Italy
item.description: Tesla FSD Inches Closer to Regulatory Approval in Italy

item.title: The Burst Phenomenon: Why Tesla's Stock Stagnation Will Soon End
item.description: While Tesla's price action has been lackluster lately, history proves that these frustrating lulls are often the quiet before the bull storm.

item.title: Elon Musk Is So Rich The President Would Need To Hold Office For 2.37 Million Years To Catch Up
item.description: The recent IPO of SpaceX and the continued success of Tesla Inc stock have made Elon Musk the world’s first trillionaire. While he is no longer a trillionaire, a wealth of $947 billion is so large that many could only...

item.title: California's New EV Rebate Makes Tesla the Winner
item.description: A $270 million program for first-time buyers covers vehicles up to $50,000, favoring Tesla's volume models over Rivian's current lineup

item.title: Tesla Semi enters new Pilot Program with interesting challenge
item.description: The Tesla Semi is entering a new Pilot Program with Paper Transport, LLC (PTI), a Wisconsin-based transportation provider. The company will test the Semi’s Long Range configuration through “dedicated operations within the Chicago market.” Chicago presents an interesting challenge for the Semi, as...

item.title: California’s new $3,500 EV rebate favors Rivian and Lucid over Tesla
item.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom signed SB 168 today, creating a new “MyFirstEV” program that gives first-time electric vehicle buyers a $3,500 instant rebate at the dealership starting later this summer. The point-of-sale discount is backed by $135.5 million in state funding, matched dollar-for-...

item.title: Tesla reveals development of wheelchair-accessible autonomous vehicle
item.description: Tesla revealed on Monday that it is building a new autonomous vehicle at Gigafactory Texas, its plant just outside of the City of Austin. This particular vehicle will be geared toward those who are in need of a wheelchair-accessible car that would require no human driver for operation. According ...

item.title: Elon Musk trolls OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over Apple trade secrets suit
item.description: Elon Musk took aim at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman on X following Apple's lawsuit against the AI startup.

item.title: Tesla says it’s building a wheelchair-accessible robotaxi in Texas
item.description: Tesla is building a purpose-built, wheelchair-accessible autonomous vehicle, a company policy advisor told lawmakers in Washington, DC, on Monday. But Tesla gave no timeline, no vehicle, and no details, and it’s not clear the “active product” is anything more than the Robovan it unveiled nearly t...

item.title: New Jersey Welcomes Robotaxis, But Only If They Have Three Sensor Technologies
item.description: New Jersey is considering legislation that would require robotaxis to have three kinds of sensor technology and 3 years of testing. The post New Jersey Welcomes Robotaxis, But Only If They Have Three Sensor Technologies appeared first on CleanTechnica .

item.title: Tesla Pulled Off A Shocker Second Quarter. Can It Keep Sales Up?
item.description: Tesla delivered over 480,000 vehicles globally in the second quarter, blowing away expectations. What happened?

item.title: Tesla’s Robotaxi Fleet Is Nearly Flawless In Recent Report
item.description: Tesla’s Robotaxi Fleet Is Nearly Flawless In Recent Report

item.title: Tesla Tears Down Model S/X Lines for Optimus Production
item.description: Tesla Tears Down Model S/X Lines for Optimus Production

item.title: Rivian Vs. Tesla: Buy Rivian to Exploit California’s Protectionist Subsidy That Snubbed Tesla
item.description: California just rewrote its EV subsidy rules in a way that shuts Tesla out and hands Rivian a channel its rival cannot touch, and the timing could not be more consequential for R2 deliveries.

item.title: Retail investors are cashing out of Apple, Tesla, and chip stocks: Chart of the Day
item.description: Retail is selling former leaders, but record market breadth shows the broader rally is still holding up.

item.title: Price Prediction: The AI Momentum Basket: Nvidia, Palantir, AMD & Tesla. Our 2027–2029 Targets
item.description: Nvidia, AMD, Palantir, and Tesla are all riding the AI wave in 2026, but the gap between their valuations, momentum, and math needed to reach bold 2029 targets reveals which name deserves conviction and which requires a leap of faith.
